name: Ambient Liquid Coupled
description: Two viscous liquid layers coupled through a living membrane. Mouse presses like a finger into the surface, creating tears that slowly heal. Bass increases surface tension, making deformations more dramatic and persistent.

params.name: Viscosity
params.description: How thick and resistant the coupled liquids feel

params.name: Vortex Strength
params.description: How strongly the mouse twists the membrane

params.name: Layer Separation
params.description: How much the subsurface layer shows through when the membrane is torn
